tweets.author: satsmanbtc.bsky.social
tweets.text:
A bank account isn’t storage for your wealth, it’s access to a system that can be changed, limited, or controlled without your input.

Bitcoin flips that idea. You hold it. You control it. No permission required.
Start learning what real ownership looks like with Satsman.

tweets.author: coin360br.bsky.social
tweets.text:
A Strategy não para. Mais 520 BTC adicionados ao baú — agora são 847.363 no total. Dólar também cresce, chegando a US$ 1,4 bi em reserva. Essa estratégia de fortalecer as duas pontas é interessante pra quem acompanha os movimento

https://coin360.com.br/strategy-reserva-usd-14-bi

tweets.author: cryptobriefly.bsky.social
tweets.text: Strategy acquired 520 bitcoin for about $35 million, raising total holdings to 847,363 BTC and increasing its USD reserve to $1.4 billion.

tweets.author: cryptobriefly.bsky.social
tweets.text: El Salvador added 8 BTC in seven days, raising its reserve above 7,689 BTC (~$490 million) while maintaining a one-bitcoin-per-day accumulation policy despite IMF pressure to stop.

tweets.author: rwatimes.bsky.social
tweets.text: ➤ The firm's strategy of undercutting competitors with low fees, previously seen with its Bitcoin ETF, is being replicated for Ether and Solana products.

tweets.author: cryptonews-poster.bsky.social
tweets.text:
Strive Asset Management boosts Bitcoin holdings by 759 BTC (~$50M). Their total BTC portfolio now exceeds 19,800 BTC, valued at ~$1.25B. CEO Matt Cole confirmed the purchase.

#crypto #blockchain #news
